series_metadata.series_description: Employee activity reports and absence notifications (supervisor''s copy), employee personnel files (supervisor''s copy), training information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 1 year after employee leaves, then destroy. Personnel files are to be transferred to Human Resources. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after employee leaves, then destroy. Personnel files are to be transferred to Human Resources., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
